title: Integrated pointing task
objective: Usar demostrativos para describir una escena nueva.

activities.prompt: This is a cup. Those are plates.
options: una taza cercana y platos lejanos
activities.correct_answer: una taza cercana y platos lejanos
activities.feedback_correct: Identificaste singular y plural con distancia.
activities.feedback_incorrect: This es una cosa cercana; those son varias lejanas.
Usa these con varios objetos aquí.

activities.feedback_correct: Those es plural y usa are.

activities.prompt: What is this? This is a map. What are those? Those are signs.
activities.feedback_correct: La escena se entiende por tus demostrativos.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Marca singular y plural con is/are.

activities.prompt: This is the entrance. Those are the exits. These are the tickets.
activities.question: What are the tickets?

activities.prompt: Write six sentences using all four demonstratives.
activities.feedback_correct: La escena incluye las cuatro relaciones.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Usa dos singulares y dos plurales.

activities.prompt: Point out objects near and far in a room and answer the AI's questions.
activities.feedback_correct: La IA evalúa demostrativo, distancia y número.
activities.feedback_incorrect: La IA pide una reformulación de cada referencia.

activities.prompt: Point to one nearby object, one distant object and two groups of objects.
activities.feedback_correct: Transferiste la regla a tu entorno.

activities.prompt: Ask and answer about six objects using this, that, these and those.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Repasa la forma asociada a distancia y cantidad.
